name: NASA DONKI Space Weather
description: Monitor space weather events from NASA's DONKI database. View Coronal Mass Ejections (CME), Geomagnetic Storms (GST), and Solar Flares (FLR) with detailed information and analysis.
author: Miyagi Team

inputs.name: startDate
inputs.label: Start Date
inputs.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to 30 days ago)

inputs.name: endDate
inputs.label: End Date
inputs.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to today)
